overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment beneath elevated highways. The character traverses a sidewalk, crosses a street at an intersection featuring a distinctive building with large industrial ventilation fans, and continues along a covered walkway with passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

events.description: approaching group of pedestrians walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing a digital advertisement billboard on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple top walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway with support pillars spanning overhead
vertical illuminated sign with WNS 11 text on building facade
illuminated advertisement display showing vehicle promotion with pricing
smooth grey concrete building facade with ventilation grates
building with large circular industrial ventilation fans visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. A digital billboard displays advertisements on the left while the distinctive WNS 11 sign is visible on a building to the right. The character approaches several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction as they near a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with distinctive ventilation building

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk and entering open crosswalk area beneath the elevated highway
futuristic black sedan drives past on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving from the initial sidewalk to the opposite side near the ventilation building

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with illuminated accents driving along the road

entered.detail: distinctive blue painted pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
orange metal barricades blocking vehicle access to pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the covered sidewalk into an open intersection area, crossing a blue-painted crosswalk. The massive building with circular industrial ventilation fans dominates the right side of the view. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the road as the character completes the street crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway alongside industrial ventilation building

events.description: pedestrian passes very close to camera temporarily obscuring part of the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing large industrial ventilation units on the left, with traffic moving on the right side beyond the railings

notable_agents.action: bald man in dark jacket walking toward camera passing by closely

entered.detail: black metal barriers separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the vehicle road
line of futuristic cars parked along the curb beyond the railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk with massive industrial ventilation units mounted on the building wall to the left. Metal safety railings separate the walkway from the road where futuristic vehicles drive past and park. Several pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, with one passing very close to the camera. The elevated highway structure continues overhead as the character progresses through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian urban canyon that transitions from a sheltered sidewalk into an open intersection and back into a covered industrial walkway. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, passing a digital billboard and a WNS 11 sign as the character approaches oncoming pedestrians. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection where they cross a blue-painted crosswalk beneath the gaze of a building dominated by circular industrial ventilation fans and passing futuristic vehicles. The camera then shifts back under cover, following the character along a sidewalk lined with metal safety railings and massive wall-mounted ventilation units. Finally, the movement continues through the urban corridor as more pedestrians pass by and vehicles navigate the road beneath the persisting overhead highway structure.
